customer_name.evidence: Gaurav baat kar raha hun HDFC Life ke behalf se, how are you? ... Customer: Ji sir. ... Agent: ... kya main aapki age jaan sakta hun? Customer: 23 saal. ... Agent: ... kya main aapki age jaan sakta hun? Customer: 23 saal. ... Agent: 23 saal ke ho? Customer: Ji, sir is age mein aap job karte ho ya business karte ho? Agent: Business.

gender.evidence: Agent: 23 saal ke ho? Customer: Ji

occupation.evidence: Customer: Mera khud ka anda, chane ka, ande roll ka bhi kaam hai.

occupation_detail.value: Egg roll and food stall owner
occupation_detail.evidence: Customer: Mera khud ka anda, chane ka, ande roll ka bhi kaam hai.

income_band_inr.evidence: Customer: Do teen lakh rupaye. Agent: Ye monthly ho jaata hai? Customer: Salana, salana.

primary_goal.evidence: Agent: ... bacchon ke future ke liye bhi sir, bacchon ko padhai ke liye, wife ke liye sir kaafi aapko pata hai sir kharche kitne zyada ho jaate hain future mein sir.

decision_maker_status.evidence: Customer: Mere bhaiya hain. ... Ab wahi sab karte hain, wahi sab dekhte hain, hum bas kamate hain.

agent_promises: 35 percent company aapko within 7 to 10 days mein sir return kar deti hai

product_fit.mismatch_reason: Customer has low income and no decision-making authority; product is unsuitable for his current financial profile.
missed_opportunities: Did not ask about existing insurance coverage.

approachability.reasoning: Customer is young, has low income, and defers all financial decisions to his brother; unlikely to convert personally.

call_narrative.opening_hook: Agent opened with a guaranteed return pitch, and the customer responded politely.
call_narrative.customer_response: Passive and deferential, repeatedly stating he leaves financial decisions to his brother.
call_narrative.key_event: Customer clarified that his brother handles all financial decisions, shifting the agent's focus to getting the brother's contact.
call_narrative.ending: Agent provided his number and asked the customer to discuss with his brother and call back.

key_quotes: Mera khud ka anda, chane ka, ande roll ka bhi kaam hai.
Ab wahi sab karte hain, wahi sab dekhte hain, hum bas kamate hain.
